flag: 'keskiyöllä' trails only 'maanantaisin'; reader may conclude midnight applies to Mondays only, not also to last-day-of-month. Safer: 'kesäkuusta elokuuhun joko kuukauden viimeisenä päivänä tai maanantaisin – aina keskiyöllä' or repeat 'keskiyöllä' in both arms.

Hour list (0, 5, 10, 15, 20) superficially resembles minute values; 'klo' prefix anchors it correctly but the overlap in number range with typical minutes is a slight readability hazard. Consider adding 'tasatunteina' or explicit ':00' notation for clarity.

'klo 9–20 sekä 22' may be read as a range extended to 22 (with 21 anomalously skipped) rather than a discrete extra hour. Safer: 'klo 9–20 ja lisäksi klo 22' or 'klo 9–20 sekä klo 22' (repeating 'klo' forces discreteness).

'klo 9.30–20.30 sekä 22.30' risks being read as the range endpoint extended to 22.30 (with 21.30 skipped), not a separate discrete firing time. Safer: 'klo 9.30–20.30 sekä klo 22.30' (repeat 'klo') or 'joka päivä puolen tunnin välein klo 9.30–20.30, lisäksi klo 22.30'.
